title: Unreal Tournament
edition_pinned: Unreal Tournament: Game of the Year Edition Steam app 13240 listing, observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1999 multiplayer arena design.
moat: Arena weapon spawns and movement tech turn map control into frag timing rather than loadout menus.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Shared maps and a fixed weapon ladder support deathmatch, CTF, and bots without campaign unlock trees.
exemplar_rationale: Codifies late-90s arena FPS depth: pure execution across modes with a fixed kit.

evidence.claim: Steam reported 4445 all-language, all-purchase user reviews for Unreal Tournament: Game of the Year Edition.
Steam appdetails genres field listed: Action.
